ai_overview: Confluence activity for 15 April 2026 was dominated by significant progress on the Rollcard project, including the finalisation of social media launch content, homepage copy decks, and critical technical pivots regarding KYC and CIP solutions due to integration timelines. Product management should specifically note the new 'Agent & Automation Projects' roadmap for the Commercial Team and the release of the BetSyn Feature Matrix and Sprint 7 release notes for Bookies. Key technical documentation was also established for 'Eve,' the Group's affiliate management platform, covering data models and onboarding procedures. Mike should prioritize reviewing the 'Rollcard Project Sync' and 'Finance Requirements' pages to understand the LexisNexis integration risks and treasury reporting needs. Additionally, the 'Weekly Report' for GDC Core highlights ongoing content pipeline issues in the Finnish market that may require product-level intervention.

highlights.title: 04/15 – Recap of your meeting with gochisel.com (GDC | Galileo | CRB | Weekly Project Sync)
highlights.author: Richard Aponte
highlights.summary: CIP Solution Pivot: the team is pivoting away from Galileo's CIP solution for launch due to timeline constraints. Covers alpha testing, fraud review, Galileo portal/G-Analytics access, bank and card embossing updates, and MobileWatt Wallets launch.

highlights.title: 04/10 – Recap of your meeting with gochisel.com (Rollcard Project Sync)
highlights.author: Richard Aponte
highlights.summary: KYC vendor risk: LexisNexis has an unacceptable 6–8 week integration timeline; team actively sourcing alternatives to avoid launch delays. Also covers new Windstar Casino partnership opportunity, metal card order, and AML policy deadline.

highlights.title: Agent & Automation Projects — Build Roadmap
highlights.author: Michael Rasile
highlights.summary: Updated sequenced build roadmap for agent and automation projects where every layer feeds the next. Covers Claude Code setup, Confluence API token creation, and a staged automation strategy.

highlights.title: Release Notes - BDC - Bookies - Sprint 7 CY 2026 - Apr 15
highlights.author: Elijah Basore
highlights.summary: Sprint 7 release notes including addition of an Author Tip block for quick contextual guidance within articles.

highlights.title: Weekly Report - w/c 14 April 2026
highlights.author: Dan Smullen
highlights.summary: Senior Director Group SEO weekly report: Finnish market content pipeline issues flagged by Patrick Kivirikko, UK/CA markets challenging for outreach. Multiple workstreams active.

pages.title: Offer Creation/Edit
pages.author: Leon Masson
pages.summary: Explains the three main Eve task types: offer creation, offer edit, and deal update. Provides guidance on identifying which applies and the downstream risks of choosing incorrectly.

pages.title: Onboarding Index
pages.author: Marco Vieira
pages.summary: Welcome index for Eve, GDC Group's affiliate marketing management platform. Links to all developer documentation: architecture overview, local setup, codebase guides.

pages.title: Data Model Relationship
pages.author: Marco Vieira
pages.summary: Documents how core Eve database tables relate to each other. The Wizard entry point creates Brand, BrandProduct, SiteBrandProduct, OperatorDeal, and Offer in sequence; all tables use soft deletes.

pages.title: Code Procedure
pages.author: Marco Vieira
pages.summary: Day-to-day working procedures for Eve: branch naming, ticket lifecycle, PR process, and deployment. GitHub Actions CI runs automatically on PRs targeting main and feature branches.

pages.title: Project Setup
pages.author: Marco Vieira
pages.summary: Step-by-step guide to running Eve locally from scratch: database import, Sail setup, environment configuration. Composer and PHP run inside Sail — no local install required.

pages.title: Tech Stack
pages.author: Marco Vieira
pages.summary: Eve is a Laravel 11 PHP application (gandalf-app) managing affiliate programs, brands, operator deals, sites, and offers across GDC's ad-tech portfolio. Uses Tailwind CSS 3.

pages.title: Scheduled Commands - Break down and Info
pages.author: Marco Vieira
pages.summary: Documents every scheduled Artisan command in the Eve application: schedule, technical background, criticality to live system, and Sentry monitoring status. All commands in routes/console.php.
